pages.text: $(flesh)Acolyte Armor$() is biomancy's armour set — four pieces of grown flesh and mineral, fitted to the body of someone who works the craft.
pages.title: Acolyte Armor

pages.text: Each piece — $(flesh)Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots$() — is grown in the $(l:3_machines/bio_forge)Bio-Forge$() around a Living Flesh core, and each costs a substantial 250 Nutrients to forge. The set comes alive: like the living weapons, it carries its own Nutrient reserve.

$(bold)A living set.$() Because Acolyte gear is grown rather than smithed, it is repaired and sustained the biomancy way — through Nutrients — rather than at an anvil. Budget the harvest accordingly: a full set is a real investment of Living Flesh and fuel.
pages.title: Upkeep
